title: Ultimate Essentials +
description: All-in-one PvP & clarity resource pack: visible invisibility, no darkness, smooth fonts, 3D mace, and lightweight performance optimizations
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2df5fe2479afddb1b83e3033231074a7af7fb27_0.webp)
# Ultimate Essentials +

**Ultimate Essentials+ is an all-in-one PvP & Clarity resource pack designed for competitive Minecraft players who want maximum visibility, zero distractions, and smooth visuals.**

**This pack combines multiple essential PvP features into one lightweight, performance-friendly resource pack, making it perfect for BedWars, SkyWars, Duels, Practice servers, and general PvP gameplay.**

## ✨ Key features

**Visible Invisibility — makes invisible players and effects easier to spot.**

**No Darkness — removes unnecessary darkness in caves and shadows for consistent visibility.**

**Upgraded 3D mace model and improved weapon clarity.**

**PvP Essentials — simplified, high-contrast item textures tailored to PvP.**

**SmoothFont — readable, low-noise font for UI and chat.**

**Clarity first — removes visual clutter and noisy textures to improve target acquisition.**

**Lightweight & optimized — structured and compressed to minimize FPS impact.**

## 🎮 Recommended For

**BedWars / SkyWars**

**Duels & Practice PvP**

**Survival PvP**

**Competitive & casual players**

## ⚙ Compatibility

**Minecraft Version: 1.20+**

**Edition: Java Edition**

**Performance: FPS-friendly & lightweight**
